LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS ROSA LEON AND JULIEANNE DURR'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 1, 2018 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302 TO GIVE DEFENDANTS AN OPPORTUNITY TO FILE A JOINT PROPOSED ANSWER TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT AS REQUIRED BY CCP 473(B). IF A PROPOSED ANSWER IS FILED ON OR BEFORE JANUARY 26, 2018, THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED AND THE DEFAULTS SET ASIDE. DEFENDANTS HAVE SHOWN GOOD CAUSE TO SET ASIDE THE DEFAULTS AGAINST THEM PER CCP 473.5 AND DOING SO COMPORTS WITH CALIFORNIA'S STRONG POLICY OF DECIDING CASES ON THEIR MERITS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: G. GONZALES; REPORTER: REYES F. HUNTER CSR#6576, EMAIL: RHUNTER@SFTC.ORG.

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT ROSA LEON AND JULIEANNE DURR'S AMENDED MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT IS OFF CALENDAR WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING REFILED. THE AMENDED MOTION DID NOT PROVIDE THE NOTICE REQUIRED BY CCP 1005. DEFENDANTS SERVED THE ORIGINAL MOTION ON PLAINTIFF AT P.O. BOX 7474, BUT PLAINTIFF'S ADDRESS IS P.O. BOX 4747. THEREFORE, PLAINTIFF'S ASSERTION THAT SHE NEVER RECEIVED ANY PAPERS FROM DEFENDANTS IS SUBSTANTIATED. DEFENDANTS MAY RE-CALENDAR THEIR MOTION TO VACATE. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: SONIA WONG, CSR #11288, EMAIL:SWONG@SFTC.ORG. (302)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2018 Off Calendar

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Feb-01-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Elizabeth Karnazes, T:650.345.9200, plaintiff/opposing party, appearing on her own behalf, by Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: The tentative ruling was discussed. After hearing, the Court adopts the tentative ruling on DEFENDANTS ROSA LEON AND JULIEANNE DURR'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND, modified, as follows:

Ms Karnazes stipulates to vacating the defaults and also to the transfer of this case to San Mateo County. Defendants Rosa Leon and Julieanne Durr's motion to set aside and vacate the defaults entered against them on August 4, 2017 is granted. The case is transferred to San Mateo County.

ORDER SIGNED after hearing.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jan-18-2018 Continued To Feb-01-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ROSA LEON and JULIEANNE DURR'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is CONTINUED to February 1, 2018 at 9:30 AM in Department 302 to give defendants an opportunity to file a joint proposed answer to the first amended complaint as required by CCP 473(b). If a proposed answer is filed on or before January 26, 2018, the motion will be granted and the defaults set aside. Defendants have shown good cause to set aside the defaults against them per CCP 473.5 and doing so comports with California's strong policy of deciding cases on their merits. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Nov-02-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rosa Leon, 650-575-8264, Defendant in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ROSA LEON and JULIEANNE DURR'S MOTION TO vacate Default is Off calendar as moot. Defendants filed an amended motion that supersedes this motion.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288, email:swong@sftc.org, Reported. (D302)

AMENDED MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Nov-02-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rosa Leon, 650-575-8264, Defendant in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant argues. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ROSA LEON AND JULIEANNE DURR'S AMENDED MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT is Off calendar without prejudice to being refiled. The amended motion did not provide the notice required by CCP 1005. Defendants served the original motion on plaintiff at P.O. Box 7474, but plaintiff's address is P.O. Box 4747. Therefore, plaintiff's assertion that she never received any papers from defendants is substantiated. Defendants may re-calendar their motion to vacate.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288, email:swong@sftc.org, Reported. (D302)
